description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:latest Docker image with a mysql:latest service and set MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs Node.js 7 via the official setup script, installs git, nodejs and a long list of development libraries (libcurl4-gnutls-dev, libicu-dev, libmcrypt-dev, libvpx-dev, libjpeg-dev, libpng-dev, libxpm-dev, zlib1g-dev, libfreetype6-dev, libxml2-dev, libexpat1-dev, libbz2-dev, libgmp3-dev, libldap2-dev, unixodbc-dev, libpq-dev, libsqlite3-dev, libaspell-dev, libsnmp-dev, libpcre3-dev, libtidy-dev), runs docker-php-ext-install mbstring mcrypt pdo_mysql curl json intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache, installs and enables xdebug via pecl, installs Composer, runs php composer.phar install, runs npm install, copies .env.testing to .env, builds assets with npm run dev, generates a Laravel app key, caches config, runs migrations and seeds the database. Cache the vendor/ and node_modules/ directories. Define a test stage job named test that executes php vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never and npm test, running on the default test stage with no extra rules.
